industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: United Power of Asia Public Company Limited
summary: United Power of Asia Public Company Limited engages in the electricity generation and property development activities in Thailand. The company was formerly known as CyberPlanet Interactive Public Company Limited and changed its name to United Power of Asia Public Company Limited in May 2015. United Power of Asia Public Company Limited was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
